name: ViewVisibilitySettings
summary: The View visibility settings class contains object visibility information related to view.

constructors.name: ViewVisibilitySettings
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ViewVisibilitySettings class

properties.name: BoltHolesVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the bolt hole visibility.

properties.name: BoltHolesVisibleInComponents
properties.summary: Gets or sets the bolt hole visibility inside components.

properties.name: BoltsVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the bolt visibility.

properties.name: BoltsVisibleInComponents
properties.summary: Gets or sets the bolt visibility inside components.

properties.name: BuildingVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the building heirarchy visibility.

properties.name: ComponentsVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the component symbol visibility.

properties.name: ComponentsVisibleInComponents
properties.summary: Gets or sets the component symbol visibility inside components.

properties.name: ConstructionLinesVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the construction line visibility.

properties.name: ConstructionPlanesVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the construction plane visibility.

properties.name: ConstructionPlanesVisibleInComponents
properties.summary: Gets or sets the construction plane visibility inside components.

properties.name: CutsVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the cut or union visibility.

properties.name: CutsVisibleInComponents
properties.summary: Gets or sets the cut visibility inside components.

properties.name: FittingsVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the fitting visibility.

properties.name: FittingsVisibleInComponents
properties.summary: Gets or sets the fitting visibility inside components.

properties.name: GridsVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the grid visibility.

properties.name: LoadsVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the load visibility.

properties.name: PartsVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the part visibility.

properties.name: PartsVisibleInComponents
properties.summary: Gets or sets the part visibility inside components.

properties.name: PointsVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the point visibility.

properties.name: PointsVisibleInComponents
properties.summary: Gets or sets the point visibility inside components.

properties.name: PourBreaksVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the pour break visibility. NOTE! this setting requires that XS_ENABLE_POUR_MANAGEMENT is set to true.

properties.name: PoursVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the pour visibility. NOTE! this setting requires that XS_ENABLE_POUR_MANAGEMENT is set to true.

properties.name: RebarsVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the reinforcement visibility.

properties.name: RebarsVisibleInComponents
properties.summary: Gets or sets the reinforcement visibility inside components.

properties.name: ReferenceObjectsVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the reference object visibility.

properties.name: SurfaceTreatmentsVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the surface treatment visibility.

properties.name: WeldsVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets the weld visibility.

properties.name: WeldsVisibleInComponents
properties.summary: Gets or sets the weld visibility inside components.
